_comment: Joomla component archetype (e.g. com_proclaim). Tracks both versions.json (current/next/active_development) and package.json:version, plus __DEPLOY_VERSION__ substitution across the conventional admin/site/modules/plugins/language trees. Consumers override `versionTracking.substituteTokens.paths` when their layout deviates (e.g. Proclaim excludes libraries/ to avoid double-substitution with lib_cwmscripture).
